title: Count Up Number

statement.markdown:
markdown: # Count Up Number Animation Challenge

Create an interactive web page that displays a counter that starts at 0 and increments every second. The counter should be displayed in the center of the page. The user should be able to reset the counter to 0.
requirements
1. The counter should start at 0 and increment every second.
2. The counter should be displayed in the center of the page.
3. The user should be able to reset the counter to 0 using a button.
4. The counter should be a number and should update dynamically.

constraints: The solution should be implemented using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
The solution should use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The counter should start at 0 and increment every second.
The counter should be displayed in the center of the page.
